rulings.Case Title: TERRY MCCOY et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Dismissal; Ntc Of Lodgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFFS ERIC BOICE and MARIA ACOSTA's Motion For Dismissal GRANTED. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND B SIMMONS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT AMERESCO, INC.'s AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Moot. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND B SIMMONS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT AMERESCO, INC.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with final leave to amend to allege all elements of causes of action for conspiracy and intentional infliction of emotional distress. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: PARKSIDE INVESTMENTS VS. QUINLAND WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF PARKSIDE INVESTMENTS'Motion To Bifurcate Trial DENIED without prejudice to raise the issue before the trial judge. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: MOUNIR KARDOSH VS. JOHN HAYES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Pltf To Tax Costs;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF MOUNIR KARDOSH's Motion To Tax Costs Continued to January 31, 2014; opposition, if any, shall be filed and served no later than January 17, 2014; reply, if any, shall be filed and served no later than January 24, 2014. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. RAY K. SHAHANI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT RAY SHAHANI's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. In its untimely opposition Plaintiff explains that contradictory allegations re: ownership of the property are made due to counsel's mistake, no such explanation appears in the Third Amended Complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ANDRZEJ-ANDREW KILON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Relief From Default Judgmnt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT ESTHER KILON's Motion For Relief From Default Judgment GRANTED as to defendant Esther Kilon only, subject to (1) defendant presenting proof of service executed by the server; (2) posting $4,019.37 with the Court no later than December 31, 2013 by 4 p.m.; and (3) filing answer no later than December 31, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: MINA RAMEZANEIGI VS. ROMULO MEJIVAR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 31, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANTS CECILIA ALVARADO and ROMULO MENJIVAR's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Complaint is verified and sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer. Whether or not the premises are subject to SFRO is an issue of fact. = (501/HMD)
